name: Sport1 Medien AG
summary: Sport1 Medien AG, together with its subsidiaries, operates as a media company in Germany, rest of Europe, and internationally. The company owns and operates SPORT1, a free-television (TV) channel; pay-TV channels, such as SPORT1+ SPORT1 US, and eSPORTS1; and SPORT1 MEDIA, a multi-platform marketer. It also provides content solutions for media channels; event and consulting services; integrated communication solutions for companies and brands; and marketing services for gaming and gambling, and media companies, as well as sports associations, leagues, and clubs. The company was formerly known as Constantin Medien AG and changed its name to Sport1 Medien AG in January 2020. The company is headquartered in Ismaning, Germany. Sport1 Medien AG is a subsidiary of Highlight Communications AG.
